Workshop Registration Confirmed

You're All Set for the Federal Benefits Workshop

Your spot is reserved. Our team will reach out to confirm your attendance and answer any questions you have ahead of the workshop.

Weber State University Parking

You'll need a parking permit to park on campus. Print and display on your dashboard — digital permits on phones will NOT work.

Download & Print Parking Permit

Valid in DAVIS W LOTS ONLY. Must be printed and displayed on driver's side dashboard.

What Happens Next?

1

Our Team Will Contact You

Within 24 hours, a member of our team will reach out to confirm your attendance and answer any preliminary questions.

2

Download Your Parking Permit

Use the download button above to get your Weber State parking permit. Print it and display on your dashboard.

3

Prepare Your Questions

Think about your specific federal benefits questions. This workshop is interactive — Ann encourages questions!

Questions Before the Workshop?

Email us at info@capitalwealth.com

Our team will respond within a few hours and can address any concerns ahead of time.

What We'll Cover in Your Federal Benefits Session

This isn't a sales meeting. It's a focused discussion about YOUR federal employee benefits and how to optimize them for retirement.

  • TSP Strategy — withdrawal options, Roth conversions, and tax planning
  • FERS vs CSRS — pension optimization and timing strategies
  • Social Security — coordination with federal pension and timing
  • FEHB in Retirement — keeping your health benefits and planning for long-term care
  • Survivor Benefits — protecting your spouse with federal survivor benefits
  • Tax Strategy — minimizing taxes on federal retirement income

Ann Werts

Ann has spent 15+ years helping federal employees navigate the complex web of federal benefits, TSP decisions, and retirement timing.

She understands the unique challenges federal employees face — from FEHB continuation to TSP withdrawal strategies to coordinating multiple income sources in retirement.

This consultation is complimentary and comes with no obligation. Come with your questions. Leave with clarity.

Prefer to schedule by phone? Call us at 801.210.2800

Monday – Friday, 9am – 5pm MST

Fiduciary. Always.
